task_completion.description: Open a chart for SPY using the Daily data series
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1D') visible in the title bar, chart tab, or Data Series configuration window.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart with the Candlestick bar type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart visually displays Candlestick bars (bodies with upper/lower wicks), or the Chart Style/Data Series menu shows 'Candlestick' selected.

task_completion.description: Include the VWAP indicator on the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'VWAP' in the 'Configured' list (bottom left), or a VWAP line is clearly visible and labeled on the chart.

task_completion.description: Include the ATR indicator with Period 14
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'ATR' in the 'Configured' list with the Period parameter set to '14' on the right side, or an ATR(14) sub-panel is visible below the main chart.

task_completion.description: Include the CurrentDayOHL indicator on the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'CurrentDayOHL' in the 'Configured' list, or the Current Day Open, High, Low lines are visible and labeled on the chart.

task_completion.description: Save the chart template with the exact name 'DayTrading'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog for Chart Templates is open with 'DayTrading' entered in the file name field, or the Templates menu (accessed via right-click -> Templates -> Load) shows 'DayTrading' as an available template.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Workspaces' in the NinjaTrader Control Center and selects 'Save' for the active workspace, or a workspace save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and indicators
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 menus, dialogs, and chart windows rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Chart windows, Indicator dialogs) is visible, not a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by directly writing the XML template file via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: The template creation process is shown through the NinjaTrader 'Save Template' dialog, rather than using echo/cat/vim commands in a terminal to create 'DayTrading.xml'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a chart template named 'DayTrading' in NinjaTrader 8. Required configuration: SPY ticker, Daily timeframe, Candlestick bars. Required indicators: VWAP, ATR (Period: 14), and CurrentDayOHL. The template must be saved via the GUI, and the workspace must be saved. Verify indicator presence via the 'Indicators' dialog window or visual labels on the chart.
